mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_visit_record ( CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, SURVEY_TOKEN, TOKEN_EXPIRES_DT, STATUS, VISIT_DT, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{designerId}, #{surveyToken}, #{tokenExpiresDt}, #{status}, #{visitDt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT v.VISIT_ID, v.CUSTOMER_ID, v.STATUS, v.VISIT_ROUTE, v.REF_DESIGNER, v.SERVICES, v.MOODS, v.STYLE_IMAGE_IDS, v.HAIR_CONCERNS, v.REQUEST_MEMO, v.TREATMENT_MENU, v.TREATMENT_PRODUCT, v.TREATMENT_DETAIL, v.TREATMENT_NOTE, v.VISIT_DT, v.SUBMIT_DT, c.CUSTOMER_NAME, c.PHONE, c.GENDER FROM tb_visit_record v JOIN tb_customers c ON v.CUSTOMER_ID = c.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE v.VISIT_ID = #{visitId} AND v.DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_visit_record SET SERVICES = #{serviceCode}, TREATMENT_MENU = #{treatmentMenu, typeHandler=com.strnd.api.common.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, TREATMENT_PRODUCT = #{treatmentProduct}, TREATMENT_DETAIL = #{treatmentDetail}, TREATMENT_NOTE = #{treatmentNote}, STATUS = 'COMPLETED', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE VISIT_ID = #{visitId} AND DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId}
